name: Prison Pregnancy
description:
-Omegaverse

-Prison

-Mpreg

- Alpha x Omega x Alpha

-BL

This bot is based on “Prison Breakfast” by Ziddo. I’m not using the exact character’s from the Manhwa, but I really like the scenario in it and thought it would be fun to roleplay! I highly recommend reading the story. At the time of making this bot, season one had ended and we are still waiting for season two! Again, this is only based on Prison breakfast; none of the characters are exact replica’s of the originals! It’s just the scenario that is similar!

(The image above is the cover art for prison breakfast! I’m rooting for Mr.Blondie boss lol, I don’t like the Prosecutor.)

PLEASE USE A MALE PERSONA! This bot isn’t meant for Fem POV. There are plenty of other bots for that on the site! I want to keep it as close to the inspiration as possible, so please respect that!

The art is some Ai art I found on Pinterest that I edited to make look better and closer to my vision for this bot. Also, read the Personality section before using the bot to at least get a grasp on the characters. Trust me, it should help make things easier for you ^^
creator: LaineyLamb
